properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: For the weapons of our warfare are not carnal, But they are mighty, yes, they are mighty! For the weapons of our warfare are not carnal, But they are mighty through the Holy Ghost.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For they are strong through the pulling down of strongholds, And they are mighty, yes, they are mighty! For they are strong through the pulling down of strongholds, And they are mighty through the Holy Ghost.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In the Name of Jesus, In the Name of Jesus We have the victory, In the Name of Jesus, In the Name of Jesus Demons will have to flee.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When we stand, In the Name of Jesus, Tell me who can stand before, In the precious Name of Jesus, We have the victory.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Victory is mine, victory is mine, Victory today is mine. I told Satan, "Get ye behind," Victory today is mine.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: What a mighty God we serve What a mighty God we serve What a mighty God we serve What a mighty God we serve
